Package org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer

package org.ddolib.modeling.nolayer
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.ddolib.modeling
     
    org.ddolib.modeling.layered
    This package contains the interfaces and abstract classes that must be implemented as problem specific classes to model a problem.It also contains default implementation.
  • Class
    Description
    AcsModel<T>
    Defines the structure of an optimization model solved using the Anytime Column Search (ACS) algorithm within the Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) framework using the NoLayer API.
    DdoModel<T>
    Defines the interface for an unlayered Dynamic Decision Diagram Optimization (DDO) model.
    DefaultFastLowerBound<T>
    Default implementation of FastLowerBound that always returns 0.0.
    FastLowerBound<T>
    Interface defining a lower bounding function for a state.
    Model<T>
    Defines the core model interface for describing an optimization problem in the NoLayer API.
    Problem<T>
    Represents an optimization problem formulated as a labeled transition system, without requiring an a priori fixed number of variables.
    Relaxation<T>
    Defines the relaxation rules for merging states in unlayered decision diagrams.
    Solvers
